title: cinchona cordifolia var. rotundifolia
intro: Cinchona cordifolia var. rotundifolia, a variety of the Cinchona plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It contains alkaloids such as quinine and cinchonine, which possess medicinal properties, primarily used to treat malaria and other fever-related conditions. The health benefits of Cinchona cordifolia var. rotundifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as headaches, fatigue, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of fever and inflammation.
